name: Health Potion
description: A small glass vial of red liquid. Tastes like copper and regret, but it works.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A larger, more potent healing draught. Restores 50 HP when consumed. A prized commodity deep in any dungeon.

name: Mana Potion
description: A blue-tinged liquid that shimmers when shaken. Restores arcane energy.

name: Antidote
description: A tightly sealed vial of pale green liquid. Neutralizes poison on contact.

name: Portal Scroll
description: A single-use scroll inscribed with unstable glyphs. Tears open a passage back to town. Don't read it wrong.

name: Ironhide Tonic
description: A thick, metallic-tasting brew. Temporarily hardens your skin to an iron-like sheen. Grants +5 defense for 5 turns.

name: Normal Arrow
description: A wooden arrow with an iron tip. Standard ammunition for an archer's bow.

name: Steam Bolt
description: A heavy iron bolt tipped with a pressure-forged head. Designed for pneumatic crossbows — incompatible with standard bows.

name: Elixir of Focus
description: A clear, sharp-smelling draught that sharpens the senses. Everything slows down — just for a moment.

name: Smelling Salts
description: A pungent mixture that jolts the senses back to clarity. Clears stun and slow effects immediately.

name: Greater Mana Potion
description: A deep indigo liquid that swirls with inner light. Restores a significant amount of resource energy.

name: Berserker Draught
description: A crimson brew that burns going down. Massively increases attack power but leaves you vulnerable.

name: Ironflask
description: A heavy flask of concentrated restorative brew. The metallic taste is overwhelming, but the healing is undeniable.

name: Gold Coins
description: A pouch of worn gold coins. Currency of the realm.

name: Mine Key
description: A heavy iron key stamped with the mine's seal. Opens the gate to the overseer's quarters.

name: Crypt Key
description: Cold iron bearing the crypt's seal. The metal feels heavier than it should.
